name: Zerodha LL Reversal Suite
scenario: Zerodha LIFO order processing — reverse order lists efficiently.

core.description: reverseBetween(head,left,right): reverse sublist [left..right] in-place. Test: [1,2,3,4,5] left=2 right=4→[1,4,3,2,5].
reverseKGroup(head,k): reverse every k nodes, leave remainder. Test: [1,2,3,4,5] k=2→[2,1,4,3,5].
isPalindrome(head): find middle + reverse second half + compare. O(n) O(1).

ai_policy_explanation: 5 hints. 3-pointer reversal: prev=null, curr=head. Loop: next=curr.next; curr.next=prev; prev=curr; curr=next. Return prev. reverseBetween: advance to position left-1 (the node before reversal start). Save prevLeft. Reverse [left..right] with count=right-left+1. Connect: prevLeft.next=prev, leftNode.next=curr. reverseKGroup: (1) count k nodes, return head if <k. (2) reverse k nodes: prev=null, curr=head, k times. (3) head.next=reverseKGroup(curr,k). Return prev. isPalindrome: find middle (fast=head), reverse from slow.next, compare head vs reversed.
